Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 143 

LINE_PRCDR_CCS_CTGRY_CD 

LABEL: Line Procedure AHRQ Clinical Classifications Software Refined (CCSR) Category Cd 

DESCRIPTION: AHRQ Clinical Classifications Software (CCS) procedure category code. The Clinical Classifications 
Software Refined (CCSR) aggregates International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical 
Modification/Procedure Coding System (ICD-10-CM/PCS)
